query:
-- Total unmatched services remaining
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_unmatched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN supplierName = 'Telstra' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as telstra_unmatched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN supplierName = 'SasBoss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sasboss_unmatched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN supplierName IN ('ABB', 'AAPT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as abb_aapt_unmatched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN supplierName NOT IN ('Telstra', 'SasBoss', 'ABB', 'AAPT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as other_unmatched
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND status NOT IN ('billing_platform_stub', 'terminated');

  SUM(CASE WHEN supplierName = 'SasBoss' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sasboss_unmatched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN supplierName IN ('ABB', 'AAPT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as abb_aapt_unmatched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN supplierName NOT IN ('Telstra', 'SasBoss', 'ABB', 'AAPT') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as other_unmatched
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND status NOT IN ('billing_platform_stub', 'terminated');
